% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
% file `"2 - devoir_mai"-exercise-7-exercise-body.tex'
%
%     exercise of type `exercise' with id `7'
%
% generated by the `exercise' environment of the
%   `xsim' package v0.20c (2021/02/03)
% from source `"2 - devoir_mai"' on 2023/04/21 on line 191
% ------------------------------------------------------------------------
    Effectue les équations suivantes. Laisse ta démarche visible.
    \begin{enumerate}[cols=2, itemsep=0.7cm]
        \item \(3x - 7 = 8\)
        \item \(2x + 7 = 10 - x\)
        \item \(\dfrac{3x}{7} = \dfrac{5}{12}\)
        \item \(\dfrac{1}{2} + \dfrac{6x}{5} = \dfrac{7}{2}\)
        \item \(2(3x + 7) - 13 = 5x + 7 - 5\)
        \item \((3x + 2)^2 - 5x = 10 - 6x + 9x^2\)
        \item \(10 = 2x - 7\)
        \item \(3(5x-1) = 3x\)
        \item \(3x-7 = 7 + 6x\)
        \item \(\dfrac{6}{7} + x = 10\)
    \end{enumerate}
